name: 2'x3' Washable Tufted Accent Rug Light Brown - Threshold™
description:
Enhance your indoor space with the eye-catching style of this Washable Tufted Accent Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular accent rug features vertical stripes on a woven backdrop in brown to elevate your space while blending effortlessly with a variety of decor styles. Easy to clean, the low-pile rug is highly versatile and suitable for high-traffic areas like your kitchen, living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
